query = (
    "SELECT metric, value, created_at "
    "FROM host_metrics "
    "WHERE host = '" + host + "' "
    "ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50"
)

cursor.execute(query)
fixes.replacement:
query = (
    "SELECT metric, value, created_at "
    "FROM host_metrics "
    "WHERE host = ? "
    "ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50"
)

cursor.execute(query, (host,))
